response.overview: A scandal – if the Emperor knew! Around 1900, moving pictures were emerging, and at the same time, the desire to present oneself naked grew. Some were happy to show even more. We invite you to witness the first steps of pornography. This authentic material from the turn of the century was provided to us by a collector who happened to find these superbly preserved film reels in his grandfather's cellar. Naturally, Herzog Video couldn't resist the opportunity to present this historical document to you with a touch of humor.
response.title: Opa's Pornokiste
